---
title: "Olfactory cues for detecting army-ant swarms in army any following birds"
image: "../images/card_pics/ghet_001.jpg"
description: "We test whether tropical birds can smell army-ant presence and activity. Controlled field experiments assess whether olfactory cues supplement auditory and visual signals in locating foraging opportunities."
categories: ["Panama PLUMAS Project", "Animal Communication & Contest Dynamics"]
contributors: "Michael Castano"
feature_order: "e"
format:
  html:
    toc: FALSE
---
